title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Amity University - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Amity University - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Amity University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About Amity University:
Amity University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amity University!
